form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== name[名称] code[编码] customerGroupCode[客户组] partnerId[客户] =========>price[价格信息]====== currencyId[币种] priority[优先级] =========>validity[有效期]====== validFrom[生效日] validTo[失效日] isActive[是否启用] =========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== name[名称] code[编码] customerGroupCode[客户组] partnerId[客户] =========>price[价格信息]====== currencyId[币种] priority[优先级] =========>validity[有效期]====== validFrom[生效日] validTo[失效日] isActive[是否启用] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
